creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Re: comment 0

> … we must not assume that a newcomer to the FreeBSD Handbook will be 
> familiar with website navigation in cgit, and so on …

For reference only, from bug 267798 (closed, not fixed): 

> … It makes no sense, many people can't read the source code 
> or the port doesn't have a pkg-descr, only a makefile. The link to 
> freshports.org is more helpful …
